name: NodeGoat A5/A3 — session cookie configured without httpOnly/secure flags

provenance.note: Vulnerable (+) side is verbatim-real: NodeGoat master configures express-session with no active cookie hardening (the 'Fix for A3 - XSS' cookie block is commented out and even there 'secure' is commented and 'maxAge' is only a TODO). The safe (-) side with a complete httpOnly+secure+maxAge cookie block is reconstructed, since master ships no committed/complete hardened cookie config.

notes: Session cookie is JS-readable (no httpOnly) and sent over HTTP (no secure). Coverage gap closed by new rule B-20.
